enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief morning vlog recap of his previous day (May 18, 2014), describing a lazy Sunday of housecleaning, working on a website, and seeing the Godzilla movie alone at the theater. He shares a quick opinion on the film and mentions plans to go biking and continue web work.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Enjoyed it; thought they did a good job making it feel plausible in a 21st-century way

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log with me, Kyle Pounds.
Today is 7 in the morning on the 19th of May, 2014.
So, what did I do yesterday on the 18th?
Yesterday was Sunday.
I was kind of tired yesterday.
I got up kind of late.
And yeah, it was just a normal lazy Sunday.
I cleaned up my house, vacuumed.
Yeah, we were going to do the surgery,
But my roommate chickened out, so I have to do that by myself later on.
Just worked all day long, all night until like 11 or something, or 10.
Yeah, I'm in sight.
So, I'm fired up to do it today.
Keep going.
Just knock out page after page.
But then I went to, I need to put all the new stuff that I put,
Like on the links.
I haven't done that.
So, maybe I'll be able to do that pretty soon.
So, that's all.
So, I've got my bike all ready to go.
I have to kind of take off in about a half hour.
Maybe I'll do some, respond to some comments now.
I saw Godzilla the other day.
I don't know if I mentioned by myself for the first time at the movie theater,
Because my mom didn't want to go see it, and I wanted to see it.
I love these action movies in 3D.
It was good.
I liked it.
He breathed fire and all that cool stuff.
I don't know if I should do a review without doing a spoiler.
I can't do reviews without spoilers.
I think they did a pretty good job making it all explainable in a new 21st century way.
There's some other things that weren't, but whatever.
It's cool.
All right.
I baffled enough.
So, that might be a lot for the day.
Peace out.
Peace out.
